studies.title: Health Economic Evaluation of  costs and benefits of a computer based program called "Deprexis" used for insured persons of the DAK (statutory health insurance) suffering from depression

_verification.reason: The study explicitly mentions 'Deprexis' by name in the title and describes it as a computer-based program for depression, which matches the product description provided. The study appears to focus specifically on this digital therapeutic.

_classification.reason: The study focuses on a health economic evaluation of a program used by insured persons in a real-world setting, likely observational and based on registry or insurance data. No indicators of randomization, blinding, or interventional design are mentioned.
